text:
Mandated by HIPAA as a unique provider number assigned for each health care provider to be used in standard electronic health care transactions. Effective August 2008. CHAR 10 x x x x x x
M0110_EPSD_TIMING_CD (M0110) Episode Timing Medicare home health payment episode for which this assessment will define a case mix group an "early" episode or a "later" episode. Effective August 2008. 1 = Early
2 = Later
UK = Unknown
NA = Not Applicable: No Medicare case mix group to be defined by this
